title: BetterEnd Elytra Fix
description: Fixes an issue with BetterEnd and Accessories/Trinkets where elytras constantly break.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ba82c4e1b62535191f7a35ef7cf8625e322a701_0.webp)

This is a simple fix mod that patches an issue with constant breaking sounds when using BetterEnd elytras with Accessories.

This bug specifically occurs due to broken usage of the Trinkets API and not checking Fabric damage handlers. This mod patches BetterEnd's elytra handler to properly call the proper Fabric events.
